scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n web,electron "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/electron dev"
scripts.build:audio:plugins: cargo check --manifest-path crates/SphereAudioPlugins/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path extentions/template/Cargo.toml && bun install --cwd extentions/template && bun run --cwd extentions/template typecheck
scripts.build:electron: bun run build:audio:plugins && bun run --cwd apps/electron build:all
